Hero.label: Co-creating together
Hero.heading: to rise and shine
Hero.fundText: NERD.BOX, RU:TINE, and CONTRAST donate 500 VND from each invoice to the YEO Vietnam Fund

About.title:
About YEO

VIETNAM
About.p1: Youth Empowerment Organization (YEO) Vietnam is an organization dedicated to guiding and developing the potential of Vietnam's youth.
About.p2: YEO Vietnam is on a mission to build a modern educational ecosystem where every individual is empowered to understand themselves and confidently shape their future.

project.title: From Beans to Dreams
project.subtitle: project
paragraphs: YEO Vietnam believes every child carries a unique "career seed" within: their potential, dreams, and individual abilities. But just like a seed in nature, not every seed has the conditions needed to sprout.

In this project, YEO Vietnam focuses on building and upgrading schools, restrooms, and clean water systems for underserved school sites. In parallel, YEO also delivers career orientation programs, helping students make clearer decisions for their futures and connect local economic strengths with suitable majors and schools.

summer-camp.title: Summer Camp
summer-camp.subtitle: career orientation camp
paragraphs: Summer Camp is a career exploration camp organized annually by YEO Vietnam. It gives students a meaningful summer through hands-on experiences in fields they are interested in.
At Summer Camp, students join engaging activities designed and run by YEO Vietnam's own team, gaining practical exposure and stronger self-understanding for future choices.

vhbc.title: Business Case Competition
vhbc.subtitle: competition
paragraphs: VHBC - Vietnam High School Business Case Competition is Vietnam's first business case-solving competition for high school students, organized by The Trainee Club - YEO Vietnam - Student Consulting Group.

The competition is designed to create a deep business learning environment for students passionate about business. It helps develop practical skills aligned with professional standards and supports career orientation for future business leaders.

talkshow.title: Pha chuyen
talkshow.subtitle: talkshow
paragraphs: “Pha Chuyện is a series of talkshows held at universities nationwide, creating a space for direct connection between students and speakers—experienced individuals who have gone before them. Here, students have the opportunity to engage in ”Pha chuyện“ (discussions) around real-world issues they face in their studies, personal development, and preparation for entering the job market.

Through Pha Chuyện, YEO Vietnam aims to become a companion for students on their various journeys, helping them build a solid foundation in mindset, skills, and career direction before officially embarking on their journey as ”young professionals

ss19.text: Summer Starter 2019: F&B Business was YEO Vietnam's first career exploration summer camp, focused on Food and Beverage (F&B), with more than 20 students over 7 days.

ss20.text: Summer Starter 2020: How I Met My Future was a career exploration and orientation program for middle school students, focused on 5 major fields: Business, Media, Service Management, Technology, and Arts.

sp21.text: Career Starter Spring Camp was a spring career-orientation camp for high school students, held in spring 2021 at Swinburne University, Hanoi.

ss22.text: Career Starter 2022 was a summer career-orientation camp for high school students at Swinburne University in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City. During the 7-day camp, students explored key tracks in economics, media, and technology - IT.

ivy.text: YEO partnered with IVY PREP to organize the Career Glow Up orientation program, where students experienced orientation sessions and activities such as presenting their personal Vision Board and writing letters to their future selves.

vhbc.text: This is the first Business Case competition for high school students, organized by The Trainee Club - YEO Vietnam - Student Consulting Group. The competition was created to provide a platform for discovering young talent and equipping high school students with essential skills for those pursuing Economics and Business.

cards.shortText: I told my mom that investing in this program for me was absolutely worth it.
cards.longText: I made many new friends, received guidance from young yet professional mentors, became more confident in presenting, and gradually discovered my strengths. My mom was truly impressed and grateful to YEO Vietnam for giving me a meaningful summer and helping me orient my path for the future.
cards.name: Ms. Vu Cam Khuyen

cards.shortText: I hope to meet the mentors and friends again next summer.
cards.longText: After 8 days at YEO Vietnam's Summer Starter camp, I had real-world exposure to many careers I had only heard about before. The farewell day was emotional and full of gratitude for the mentors and classmates.
cards.name: Ms. Thuy Nguyen

cards.shortText: Thank you, YEO Vietnam, for giving our children a meaningful and memorable summer.
cards.longText: Sending my child to YEO Vietnam's summer camp was truly the right decision. Even with a packed schedule, my child stayed excited, became more confident, and matured noticeably. My child told me the trip was worth it and wanted to continue joining impactful experiential programs like this.
cards.name: Ms. Pham Thi Ngoc

cards.shortText: I feel more confident about the road ahead and more motivated.
cards.longText: I had joined another career orientation class before, but I still felt uncertain and did not fully understand myself. After listening to YEO's shared knowledge and experiences, I gained much more clarity and motivation. Thank you to the YEO team for organizing such an excellent sharing session.
cards.name: Mai Anh

Fund.title: YEO Vietnam Fund
Fund.p1: The YEO Vietnam Fund was established through the collaboration of three brands: Nerd.box, Contrast, and Ru:tine, with a mechanism of deducting 500 VND from each invoice. Additionally, business partners contribute to each project, all working towards the goal of empowering the young generation of Vietnam.
Fund.p2: Born with the mission of expanding development opportunities for young people, the Fund focuses on implementing exemplary educational projects such as: From Beans to Dreams, Summer Camp - Career Orientation, Vietnam High School Business Case Competition, and many other sustainable initiatives.
Fund.p3: Through small but persistent contributions, the YEO Vietnam Fund is gradually helping to build a confident and capable young generation that is ready to create a bright future for Vietnam.

Footer.text: Empowering the next generation of Vietnam.
